infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Anaaj AI to use your location to suggest relevant farming information.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Anaaj AI to use your microphone for voice queries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Anaaj AI to capture photos of crops for disease analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Anaaj AI to access your gallery to analyze crop photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Anaaj AI to use your microphone for voice queries.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Anaaj AI to access your photos to diagnose crop diseases.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Anaaj AI to take photos of your crops for instant AI analysis.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Anaaj AI to use your location to suggest relevant farming information.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Anaaj AI to use your location.
